steps.title: Compare telescope positions
steps.content: The first sentence says JWST is almost one million miles beyond Earth's orbit. The next sentence says Hubble is only about 340 miles above Earth's surface, creating a sharp distance contrast.

steps.title: Choose the contrast signal
steps.content: A signals a result, B signals similarity, and D signals sequence. The relationship between JWST's distant location and Hubble's much closer orbit is contrast. The answer is C.
